calendar.matters:
Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Immediate Relief Requested For Caap Application Processing Delays
Off Calendar Feb-14-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PAUL JAMES CROMWELL's Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Immediate Relief Requested For Caap Application Processing Delays.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar for failure to provide courtesy copies per SF Local Rule 2.7B and for failure to provide proof of service pursuant to Rule of Court 3.1300(a), (c).

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
